title: Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi
tagline: Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kunnakudi Shanmughanathar temple (also called Kunnakudi Temple or Kunnakudi Murugan Temple) in Kundrakudi, a village in the outskirts of Karaikudi in Sivaganga district in the Sout
overview.description: Kunnakudi Shanmughanathar temple (also called Kunnakudi Temple or Kunnakudi Murugan Temple) in Kundrakudi, a village in the outskirts of Karaikudi in Sivaganga district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Murugan. Constructed in the Hindu style of architecture, the temple is located in the Tirupattur - Karaikudi Road, around 14 km (14,000 m) from Karaikudi. There are three caves located on the western side of the lower rock, that has rock-cut shrines from the Pandyan Empire from the 8th century. The caves have the earliest sculptural representation of Dvarapa

topPlaces.name: Kundrakudi
topPlaces.description: Kundrakudi is a village in Sivaganga district that houses a famous Murugan temple, Shanmughanathar Temple, atop a small hill near Karaikudi, India. The place is also known as Kunnakudi.

topPlaces.name: Palavangudi
topPlaces.description: Palavangudi is a rural village located in the southern-most state of Tamil Nadu in the Republic of India. Palavangudi is one of 44 panchayat villages in the Sivaganga District's Kallal revenue block.

topPlaces.name: Karpaka Vinayakar Temple
topPlaces.description: Karpaka Vinayaka Temple or Pillaiyarpatti Pillaiyar Temple is a 7th-century-CE rock-cut cave shrine, significantly expanded over the later centuries. It is located in Pillayarpatti village in Tiruppathur Taluk, Sivaganga district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Nachiapuram
topPlaces.description: Nachiapuram is a village located in Sivagangai District in the State of Tamil Nadu in India. Nachiapuram is a panchayat with elected members, and forms part of the Kallal Union.

topPlaces.name: Alangudi (Sivaganga)
topPlaces.description: Alangudi is a village in Sivaganga district of Tamil Nadu State in South India. Its area pin code is 630307.

topPlaces.name: Kattubava Mosque
topPlaces.description: The Kattubava Mosque, also known as the Kattubava Pallivasal, is a Sufi mosque located in the village of Kathvapallivasal, in the Pudukkottai district of the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The mosque is situated 30 kilometres (19 mi) from Pudukkottai on the Thirumayam-Madurai highway.

topPlaces.name: Tiruppattur, Sivaganga
topPlaces.description: Tiruppattur, also spelt Tiruppathur or Thiruppathur, is a Taluk, Town Panchayat in Sivaganga district in the India state of Tamil Nadu. This town is located 22 km from Karaikudi and 27 km from Sivaganga.

topPlaces.name: Sankarapuram
topPlaces.description: Sankarapuram is a census town panchayat of Sivaganga district in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This census town is located in southwestern Karaikudi on national highway NH536.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (72 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi?
faq.a: Stays in Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kundrakudi, Palavangudi, Karpaka Vinayakar Temple, Nachiapuram, Alangudi (Sivaganga).
